name: Catfish in Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown finely-chopped garlic and green onions in butter over medium heat until fragrant.
2. Flour the catfish fillets on both sides.
3. Add mushrooms to the pan and cook until softened.
4. Pour in beer and lemon juice, then add Worcestershire sauce.
5. Turn off heat and simmer for a few minutes.
6. Serve hot with cooked rice, spooning any pan gravy over the top.
